description: Log in to Moodle as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) at http://localhost/moodle to set up a new course and a secure final assignment. Create a new course in the "Humanities" category with the full name "Business Ethics" and short name "ETHICS101". In this course, create an Assignment activity named "Final Capstone Paper" with the description "Submit your final analysis of the corporate governance case study." Configure the assignment to accept only PDF files (.pdf) and enable "Blind marking", "Use marking workflow", and "Use marking allocation".
